name: Lyric Jeans, Inc.
summary: Lyric Jeans, Inc. designs and manufactures music inspired lifestyle apparel and accessories. It offers women's, men's, junior's, and pet's apparel; and footwear and home decor products. The company offers its products through its stores in the United States. It also offers its products online. Lyric Jeans, Inc. was founded in 2006 and is based in West Hollywood, California.
